refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as per constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine with traceability metadata
Centralized performance requirements database with version control
Update management system for baselines and calibration history
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated performance requirements management system combining derivation algorithms, traceable recording, and update management

potential_sources: Tight coupling between derivation logic and recording database
Update management dependent on accurate traceability
coupling_check.notes: The integrated DP logically groups related functions to minimize interface complexity and maintain traceability.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate worksite mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not robust
High safety criticality requires rigorous validation of derivation algorithms
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure modular design within integrated DP to isolate derivation, recording, and update management functions for maintainability.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: System-level module responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives worksite mission context and operational data for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance requirements to vehicle and teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data synchronization and update management across distributed modules

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as core logic and data reside here; low diffusion due to limited external dependencies.
Vehicle module consumes performance requirements but does not contain derivation or management logic.
Teleoperation uses performance data for control but does not manage or derive requirements.
Safety Services may receive alerts but is not involved in performance requirement derivation or management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing performance requirement derivation and management in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports traceability.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex
Risk of interface overload on Network Link if synchronization is not optimized
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider internal modularization within NGHE Solution to separate derivation, recording, and update management submodules.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are well matched by the selected integrated DP, maintaining traceability and addressing all sub-functions.

diffusion_risks: Moderate risk of diffusion if NGHE Solution interfaces are not well defined
Potential complexity in Network Link interface management
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as appropriate IM boundary with low diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability and history records within NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functional requirements to NGHE Solution IM with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine internal modularization within NGHE Solution to reduce complexity
Define interface protocols on Network Link to minimize diffusion

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, internal modularization within NGHE Solution is needed to reduce complexity and diffusion risks.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: To introduce internal modular boundaries within NGHE Solution for better containment and maintainability.

assumptions: Worksite mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can support internal modularization
open_risks: Complexity of integrated DP may impact maintainability
Interface overload on Network Link may cause performance issues
evidence_needed: Demonstration of internal modular design within NGHE Solution
Performance metrics on interface usage and data synchronization
